water_leak_sensor.description: Detects water leaks, placed under sinks, appliances, near pipes, in the bathroom

schema.title: WaterLeakSensor
schema.description: A smart home water leak detection sensor

name.description: User-facing product name as it appears in the listing, e.g. 'Aqara Water Leak Sensor T1'

model.description: Model identifier or SKU as stated by the manufacturer, e.g. 'SJCGQ12LM'.

ecosystem.description: Smart home ecosystems this device can connect to through any connection path (direct or via hub/bridge) - may be multiple.

protocol.description: Wireless protocols supported by this device.

battery_life_months.description: Expected battery life in months as stated by manufacturer.

rechargeable.description: Whether the device has a built-in rechargeable battery.

ip_rating.description: Ingress protection rating, e.g. 'IP67'. Indicates water and dust resistance.

has_audio_alert.description: Whether the sensor emits an audible alarm when a leak is detected.

audio_alert_volume_db.description: Volume of the audible alert in decibels, e.g. 85.

detects_leaks_above.description: Whether the sensor can detect water dripping from above via contacts on top.

detects_leaks_below.description: Whether the sensor detects water on the floor via bottom contacts.

min_detected_water_level_mm.description: For leak detection below the device via bottom contacts - minimum detectable water layer thickness in millimeters, e.g. 0.5.

smart_lamp.description: A smart light bulb or lamp that can be controlled remotely via app or voice

schema.title: SmartLamp
schema.description: A smart home light bulb or lamp

name.description: Product name as it appears in the listing, e.g. 'Yeelight Smart Bulb W3'

model.description: Model identifier as stated by the manufacturer, e.g. 'YLDP010'.

ecosystem.description: Smart home ecosystems this bulb works with, through any connection path.

protocol.description: Wireless protocols supported by this device.

socket_type.description: The socket or base type this bulb fits into. 'integrated' for fixtures where the bulb is not replaceable, e.g. a smart light strip or panel.

wattage_w.description: How much power the bulb consumes in watts, e.g. 8.5.

brightness_lm.description: Maximum brightness in lumens, e.g. 800. Higher is brighter.

color_temp_min_k.description: Warmest color temperature in Kelvin, e.g. 2700. Lower values are more yellow/warm.

color_temp_max_k.description: Coolest color temperature in Kelvin, e.g. 6500. Higher values are more white/cool.

rgb_support.description: Whether the bulb can display colors, not just white light.

cri.description: Color Rendering Index - how accurately the bulb reproduces colors compared to natural light. 80+ is good, 90+ is excellent.

dimmable.description: Whether the bulb supports dimming via the app or ecosystem.

voltage_min_v.description: Minimum operating voltage in volts, e.g. 220.

voltage_max_v.description: Maximum operating voltage in volts, e.g. 240.

lifespan_hours.description: Rated lifespan in hours as stated by the manufacturer, e.g. 15000.

gas_leak_sensor.description: Detects gas leaks (natural gas, LPG, carbon monoxide), typically installed near gas appliances or on the ceiling

schema.title: GasLeakSensor
schema.description: A smart home gas leak detection sensor

name.description: Product name as it appears in the listing, e.g. 'Aqara Gas Sensor'

model.description: Model identifier as stated by the manufacturer, e.g. 'JTQJ-BF-01LM'.

ecosystem.description: Smart home ecosystems this device can connect to through any connection path.

protocol.description: Wireless protocols supported by this device.

detected_gas.description: Types of gas or hazard this sensor can detect. natural_gas = methane/CH4, lpg = propane/butane.

has_audio_alert.description: Whether the sensor emits an audible alarm when gas is detected.

audio_alert_volume_db.description: Volume of the audible alert in decibels, e.g. 85.

power_source.description: Power sources supported by this device. ac_dc_adapter means An AC/DC adapter is a power supply that allows the device to run by plugging it into an outlet. battery = disposable batteries, rechargeable_battery = built-in rechargeable battery charged via USB or other means. Multiple values allowed

smart_doorbell.description: A smart doorbell with a button and notification capability, optionally with a camera and two-way audio

name.description: Product name as it appears in the listing, e.g. 'Aqara Video Doorbell G4'

model.description: Model identifier as stated by the manufacturer.

ecosystem.description: Smart home ecosystems this device can connect to through any connection path.

protocol.description: Wireless protocols supported by this device.

has_camera.description: Whether the doorbell includes a built-in camera for video.

resolution.description: Video resolution if a camera is present.

has_two_way_audio.description: Whether the doorbell supports two-way audio communication with the visitor.

has_night_vision.description: Whether the camera supports night vision or infrared recording in low light.

has_motion_detection.description: Whether the doorbell can detect motion and trigger alerts without the button being pressed.

power_source.description: Power sources supported by this device. ac_dc_adapter means An AC/DC adapter is a power supply that allows the device to run by plugging it into an outlet. battery = disposable batteries, rechargeable_battery = built-in rechargeable battery charged via USB or other means. Multiple values allowed

battery_quantity.description: Number of disposable batteries required, e.g. 6 for '6 x AA'. Only relevant if battery is in power_source.

battery_life_months.description: Expected battery life in months as stated by manufacturer.

ip_rating.description: Ingress protection rating for outdoor use, e.g. 'IP65'.

local_storage.description: Whether the device supports local video storage, e.g. via microSD card.

cloud_storage.description: Whether the device supports cloud video storage.

smart_lock.description: A smart door lock that can be controlled remotely, supports keypad, fingerprint, card, or app-based access

name.description: Product name as it appears in the listing, e.g. 'Aqara Smart Lock U100'

model.description: Model identifier as stated by the manufacturer.

ecosystem.description: Smart home ecosystems this device can connect to through any connection path.

protocol.description: Wireless protocols supported by this device.

access_methods.description: Methods supported for unlocking. keypad = PIN code entry, rfid_card = NFC or RFID card.

auto_lock.description: Whether the lock automatically re-locks after a set time.

tamper_alert.description: Whether the lock sends an alert if someone tries to tamper with or force it.

power_source.description: Power sources supported by this device. ac_dc_adapter means An AC/DC adapter is a power supply that allows the device to run by plugging it into an outlet. battery = disposable batteries, rechargeable_battery = built-in rechargeable battery charged via USB or other means. Multiple values allowed

battery_life_months.description: Expected battery life in months as stated by manufacturer.

battery_quantity.description: Number of disposable batteries required, e.g. 6 for '6 x AA'. Only relevant if battery is in power_source.

door_thickness_min_mm.description: Minimum supported door thickness in millimeters.

door_thickness_max_mm.description: Maximum supported door thickness in millimeters.

ip_rating.description: Ingress protection rating for outdoor use, e.g. 'IP65'.

door_window_sensor.description: A magnetic contact sensor that detects whether a door or window is open or closed

schema.title: DoorWindowSensor
schema.description: A smart home door and window open/close sensor

name.description: Product name as it appears in the listing, e.g. 'Aqara Door and Window Sensor P2'

model.description: Model identifier as stated by the manufacturer.

ecosystem.description: Smart home ecosystems this device can connect to through any connection path.

protocol.description: Wireless protocols supported by this device.

battery_quantity.description: Number of disposable batteries required, e.g. 6 for '6 x AA'. Only relevant if battery is in power_source.

battery_life_months.description: Expected battery life in months as stated by manufacturer.

ip_rating.description: Ingress protection rating, relevant for outdoor installation.

motion_sensor.description: Detects motion or presence in a room, typically using PIR or radar technology

schema.title: MotionSensor
schema.description: A smart home motion or presence sensor

name.description: Product name as it appears in the listing, e.g. 'Aqara Motion Sensor P1'

model.description: Model identifier as stated by the manufacturer.

ecosystem.description: Smart home ecosystems this device can connect to through any connection path.

protocol.description: Wireless protocols supported by this device.

sensor_type.description: Detection technology. pir = passive infrared, detects movement only. radar/microwave = can detect stationary presence.

detection_range_m.description: Maximum detection range in meters, e.g. 7.

detection_angle_deg.description: Horizontal detection angle in degrees, e.g. 100. Indicates the value at the maximum detection range.

has_light_sensor.description: Whether the device also includes an ambient light sensor reporting lux values.

retrigger_interval_s.description: Minimum interval in seconds between consecutive motion detection events (blind time).

battery_quantity.description: Number of disposable batteries required, e.g. 6 for '6 x AA'. Only relevant if battery is in power_source.

battery_life_months.description: Expected battery life in months as stated by manufacturer.

ip_rating.description: Ingress protection rating, relevant for outdoor installation.

smart_camera.description: An indoor or outdoor smart surveillance camera with remote viewing capability

name.description: Product name as it appears in the listing, e.g. 'Aqara Camera Hub G3'

model.description: Model identifier as stated by the manufacturer.

ecosystem.description: Smart home ecosystems this device can connect to through any connection path.

protocol.description: Wireless protocols supported by this device.

has_night_vision.description: Whether the camera supports night vision or infrared recording in low light.

has_two_way_audio.description: Whether the camera has a microphone and speaker for two-way communication.

has_motion_detection.description: Whether the camera can detect motion and send alerts.

has_person_detection.description: Whether the camera uses AI to distinguish people from general motion.

indoor_outdoor.description: Whether the camera is designed for indoor use, outdoor use, or both.

ptz.description: Whether the camera supports pan, tilt, and zoom (motorized rotation).

local_storage.description: Whether the camera supports local video storage, e.g. via microSD card.

cloud_storage.description: Whether the camera supports cloud video storage.

power_source.description: Power sources supported by this device. ac_dc_adapter means An AC/DC adapter is a power supply that allows the device to run by plugging it into an outlet. battery = disposable batteries, rechargeable_battery = built-in rechargeable battery charged via USB or other means. Multiple values allowed

battery_life_months.description: Expected battery life in months if battery-powered.

ip_rating.description: Ingress protection rating, relevant for outdoor cameras, e.g. 'IP66'.

field_of_view_deg.description: Horizontal field of view in degrees, e.g. 130.

smart_siren.description: A smart siren or alarm device that emits a loud sound and optionally flashing light as a security deterrent or alert

schema.title: SmartSiren
schema.description: A smart home siren or security alarm

name.description: Product name as it appears in the listing, e.g. 'Aqara Presence Sensor FP2'

model.description: Model identifier as stated by the manufacturer.

ecosystem.description: Smart home ecosystems this device can connect to through any connection path.

protocol.description: Wireless protocols supported by this device.

max_volume_db.description: Maximum siren volume in decibels, e.g. 110.

has_strobe_light.description: Whether the alarm includes a flashing strobe light.

has_tamper_detection.description: Whether the alarm triggers if someone tries to remove it from the wall.

power_source.description: Power sources supported by this device. ac_dc_adapter means An AC/DC adapter is a power supply that allows the device to run by plugging it into an outlet. battery = disposable batteries, rechargeable_battery = built-in rechargeable battery charged via USB or other means. Multiple values allowed

battery_quantity.description: Number of disposable batteries required, e.g. 6 for '6 x AA'. Only relevant if battery is in power_source.

ip_rating.description: Ingress protection rating, relevant for outdoor installation.

indoor_outdoor.description: Whether the alarm is designed for indoor or outdoor use.

smart_hub.description: A smart home hub or gateway that connects and controls other smart home devices, bridging protocols like Zigbee or Z-Wave to Wi-Fi

schema.title: SmartHub
schema.description: A smart home hub, gateway, or bridge device

name.description: Product name as it appears in the listing, e.g. 'Aqara Hub M2'

model.description: Model identifier as stated by the manufacturer, e.g. 'HM2-G01'.

ecosystem.description: Smart home ecosystems this hub connects to or bridges into.

protocol.description: Wireless protocols this hub supports for connecting child devices, e.g. ['zigbee', 'wifi'] for a hub that bridges Zigbee devices to Wi-Fi.

max_connected_devices.description: Maximum number of child devices this hub can connect simultaneously, as stated by manufacturer.

has_local_processing.description: Whether automations and device control work locally without internet connection.

has_ir_blaster.description: Whether the hub includes an infrared blaster for controlling IR-based devices like TVs and air conditioners.

wired_connection.description: Wired connectivity options. ethernet = RJ45 port for wired network connection. usb_host = USB port for connecting USB dongles or devices.

power_source.description: Power sources supported. Most hubs are mains or usb powered. ac_dc_adapter = powered via an included AC/DC adapter plugged into a wall socket.

matter_bridge.description: Whether this hub acts as a Matter bridge, exposing connected non-Matter devices to Matter-compatible ecosystems like Apple Home or Google Home.

zigbee_version.description: Zigbee protocol version supported, if applicable. zigbee_3.0 is backward compatible with 1.2 devices.

unknown.description: Device that doesn't fit into any other category.
